purpose: Compact progress snapshot for humans, Codex, Claude and future agents.

Codex.currentWork: Maintaining source-backed docs, machine-readable backlog/context and progress surfaces; latest pass resolved Wiki Quality DUP-6 by routing lifecycle/boot truth-table detail to Lifecycle-Wait-Chain.md.
Codex.nextExpectedOutput: Continue with the next bounded source-backed lane; likely candidates are remaining duplicate reductions, Arma 2 OA external-reference integration into subsystem pages, or more implementation-readiness playbooks.

Codex-2.currentWork: Source-checking the paratrooper support marker callback and deciding whether to publish a minimal revival patch or a patch-ready handoff.
Codex-2.nextExpectedOutput: Paratrooper marker revival source evidence, safe implementation shape, validation plan and coordination updates.

Claude.currentWork: DR-41 attack-wave authority finding has a dedicated playbook; Claude can continue with the next source-backed review under Claude-Loop-Goal.md or inspect implementation readiness.
Claude.nextExpectedOutput: Read shared state, follow Codex handoffs first, then self-select another source-backed review if idle.

updateProtocol: Before substantial work, update agent-collaboration.json and append a claim event to agent-events.jsonl.
For long work, append heartbeat events with current source scope.
For source-backed issues, append finding events and add Agent-Worklog.md notes.
When done, append complete or handoff events and update dashboard/status files if visible progress changed.
